items.title: The Neowsletter - February 2026
items.summary: Mega Crit's February Neowsletter previews Slay the Spire 2's March Early Access launch and urges players to wrap up pre-release goals.

items.title: The Neowsletter - January 2026
items.summary: January Neowsletter marks Slay the Spire's anniversary and reflects on the series ahead of the sequel.

items.title: Slay the Spire 2 Releases in Early Access on March 5, 2026!
items.summary: Steam confirms Slay the Spire 2 arrives in Early Access on March 5, 2026 and links the official trailer and wishlist.

items.title: Slay the Spire 2 is out NOW in Early Access!!
items.summary: Launch post confirms Slay the Spire 2 is live on Steam Early Access; includes store link and studio thank-you.

items.title: The Neowsletter - March 2026
items.summary: March Neowsletter from Mega Crit's Casey thanks the community for launch response and highlights initial reactions.

items.title: Beta Patch Notes - v0.99
items.summary: Patch v0.99 delivers bug fixes, art additions, and a new max-HP cap; note: the update is initially for newly released platforms.

items.title: Hotfix Patch Notes - v0.98.1
items.summary: Day-one hotfix addresses reported issues and softlocks; players are encouraged to submit in-game feedback.

items.title: Release Date Trailer
items.summary: Mega Crit published the official release-date trailer for Slay the Spire 2.

items.title: Just Announced Slay The Spire 2 Copy
items.summary: Mega Crit's original Slay the Spire 2 announcement post.

items.title: Youtooz X Slay The Spire Limited Edition Figures Out Now
items.summary: Mega Crit posted about the Youtooz Slay the Spire limited-edition figures release.

item.title: Release Date Trailer
item.summary: Mega Crit published the official release-date trailer for Slay the Spire 2.

item.summary: Mega Crit's February Neowsletter previews Slay the Spire 2's March Early Access launch and urges players to wrap up pre-release goals.
